title: Gröna hissen
writer: Avery Hopwood, Torsten Lundqvist, Kar de Mumma
actors: Max Hansen, Sickan Carlsson, Gaby Stenberg
plot: Ulla thinks her husband Billy is boring and starts dating other men. Lillans husband Peter is having important meetings, including girls. Billy and Lillan decides to pretend to be in love, to rouse jealousy of Ulla and Peter.
